name: Tomatoe-Cheese Calzones
recipeIngredient: 1/2 cup Sun-dried tomatoes in oil, drained and chopped
2 pounds Pizza dough, thawed if frozen
recipeInstructions:
1. Preheat oven to 450°F.
2. In a medium bowl, combine the cheese, salami, and sun-dried tomatoes; toss.
3. Divide the dough into 6 pieces.
4. On a floured surface, with a floured rolling pin, roll each piece of dough into a 7-inch round.
5. Place about half of the cheese mixture on one side of each round, dividing evenly.
6. Moisten the edges with water and fold the right side of the dough over so the edges meet. Press the edges to seal; crimp.
7. Place on a large baking sheet. With scissors, make three 1/2-inch slits in the top of each calzone.
8. Bake for 20-25 minutes or until well-browned. Cool briefly before serving.
